testcase.classname: KitchenHub API GET /api/health returns 200 with status, timestamp, and version
testcase.name: KitchenHub API GET /api/health returns 200 with status, timestamp, and version

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores GET /api/stores returns All store first then DB stores
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores GET /api/stores returns All store first then DB stores

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores GET /api/stores/:id returns All store for id -1
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores GET /api/stores/:id returns All store for id -1

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores GET /api/stores/:id returns 404 when store not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores GET /api/stores/:id returns 404 when store not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores GET /api/stores/:id returns store when found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores GET /api/stores/:id returns store when found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores POST /api/stores creates store
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores POST /api/stores creates store

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores PUT /api/stores/-1 returns 403 for All store
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores PUT /api/stores/-1 returns 403 for All store

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores DELETE /api/stores/-1 returns 403 for All store
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores DELETE /api/stores/-1 returns 403 for All store

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores PUT /api/stores/:id returns 404 when store not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores PUT /api/stores/:id returns 404 when store not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Stores DELETE /api/stores/:id returns 404 when store not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Stores DELETE /api/stores/:id returns 404 when store not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones GET /api/stores/-1/zones returns synthetic General zones
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones GET /api/stores/-1/zones returns synthetic General zones

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones GET /api/stores/1/zones returns zones from DB
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones GET /api/stores/1/zones returns zones from DB

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/-1/zones returns 403 for All store
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/-1/zones returns 403 for All store

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones creates zone
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones creates zone

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones returns 400 for invalid store id
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones returns 400 for invalid store id

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones/swap returns 403 for All store
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones/swap returns 403 for All store

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones/swap returns 400 when seqA/seqB missing
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones/swap returns 400 when seqA/seqB missing

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones/swap succeeds
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones POST /api/stores/1/zones/swap succeeds

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones DELETE /api/stores/-1/zones/1/1 returns 403 for All store
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones DELETE /api/stores/-1/zones/1/1 returns 403 for All store

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Store zones DELETE /api/stores/1/zones/1/1 deletes zone
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Store zones DELETE /api/stores/1/zones/1/1 deletes zone

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Departments GET /api/departments returns list
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Departments GET /api/departments returns list

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Departments POST /api/departments creates department
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Departments POST /api/departments creates department

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Departments PATCH /api/departments/:id updates ingredient flag
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Departments PATCH /api/departments/:id updates ingredient flag

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Items GET /api/items returns list
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Items GET /api/items returns list

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Items GET /api/items/:id returns 404 when not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Items GET /api/items/:id returns 404 when not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Items GET /api/items/1 returns item
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Items GET /api/items/1 returns item

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Items POST /api/items creates item
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Items POST /api/items creates item

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Items PUT /api/items/:id returns 404 when not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Items PUT /api/items/:id returns 404 when not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Items DELETE /api/items/:id returns 404 when not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Items DELETE /api/items/:id returns 404 when not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list GET /api/shopping-list/-1 returns list for All store
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list GET /api/shopping-list/-1 returns list for All store

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list GET /api/shopping-list/1 returns list for store
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list GET /api/shopping-list/1 returns list for store

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list GET /api/shopping-list returns all items
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list GET /api/shopping-list returns all items

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list POST /api/shopping-list adds item
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list POST /api/shopping-list adds item

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list PUT /api/shopping-list/:name returns 400 when no fields to update
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list PUT /api/shopping-list/:name returns 400 when no fields to update

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list PUT /api/shopping-list/:name updates quantity
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list PUT /api/shopping-list/:name updates quantity

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list PUT /api/shopping-list/:name returns 404 when not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list PUT /api/shopping-list/:name returns 404 when not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list PATCH /api/shopping-list/:name/purchased updates purchased
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list PATCH /api/shopping-list/:name/purchased updates purchased

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list PATCH /api/shopping-list/:name/purchased returns 404 when not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list PATCH /api/shopping-list/:name/purchased returns 404 when not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list DELETE /api/shopping-list/:name removes item
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list DELETE /api/shopping-list/:name removes item

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Shopping list DELETE /api/shopping-list/:name returns 404 when not found
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Shopping list DELETE /api/shopping-list/:name returns 404 when not found

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Recipes — add to shopping list POST /api/recipes/:id/shopping-list increments by qty × to_grams
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Recipes — add to shopping list POST /api/recipes/:id/shopping-list increments by qty × to_grams

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Recipes — add to shopping list POST /api/recipes/:id/shopping-list scales ingredient quantities
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Recipes — add to shopping list POST /api/recipes/:id/shopping-list scales ingredient quantities

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Recipes — add to shopping list POST /api/recipes/:id/shopping-list returns 400 when scale is invalid
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Recipes — add to shopping list POST /api/recipes/:id/shopping-list returns 400 when scale is invalid

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Recipes — add to shopping list POST /api/recipes/:id/shopping-list returns 404 when recipe missing
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Recipes — add to shopping list POST /api/recipes/:id/shopping-list returns 404 when recipe missing

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Schedulable meal-planner filters GET /api/recipe-categories?schedulable=1 filters to schedulable categories
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Schedulable meal-planner filters GET /api/recipe-categories?schedulable=1 filters to schedulable categories

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Schedulable meal-planner filters GET /api/recipes?schedulable=1 includes schedulable recipe filter
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Schedulable meal-planner filters GET /api/recipes?schedulable=1 includes schedulable recipe filter

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Meal planner GET /api/meal-planner returns slot kcal and meal kcal/leftover metadata
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Meal planner GET /api/meal-planner returns slot kcal and meal kcal/leftover metadata

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Meal planner PATCH /api/meal-planner/slot-kcal updates slot kcal
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Meal planner PATCH /api/meal-planner/slot-kcal updates slot kcal

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Meal planner POST /api/meal-planner/leftovers/auto-link defaults to next lunch slot
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Meal planner POST /api/meal-planner/leftovers/auto-link defaults to next lunch slot

testcase.classname: KitchenHub API Error handling GET /api/stores returns 500 on DB error
testcase.name: KitchenHub API Error handling GET /api/stores returns 500 on DB error
